plugin.name: VR N.E.K.O.cat
plugin.description: UDP → AnyaDance → SteamVR → VRChat FBT. Full gestures/emotion/dance/vision/locomotion support.
entries.start_stream.name: Start UDP Streaming
entries.start_stream.description: Start sending UDP pose packets to AnyaDance at 60Hz
entries.stop_stream.name: Stop UDP Streaming
entries.stop_stream.description: Stop sending UDP packets to AnyaDance
entries.apply_preset.name: Apply Preset Pose
entries.apply_preset.description: Apply a preset pose (standing / t_pose / menu)
entries.set_device_pose.name: Set Device Pose
entries.set_device_pose.description: Set 3D position and quaternion rotation of a device
entries.set_finger_bends.name: Set Finger Bends
entries.set_joystick.name: Set Joystick
entries.press_button.name: Press/Release Button
entries.press_button.description: Press or release a controller button
entries.hand_gesture.name: Hand Gesture
entries.play_dance.name: Play Dance
entries.play_dance.description: Load and play a VMD dance motion file
entries.stop_dance.name: Stop Dance
entries.mirror_hands.name: Mirror Hands
entries.mirror_hands.description: Mirror left hand pose to right
entries.mirror_feet.name: Mirror Feet
entries.mirror_feet.description: Mirror left foot pose to right
entries.set_emotion.name: Set Emotion
entries.set_emotion.description: Set VR model emotion (12 types: happy/angry/sad/excited/shy etc.)
entries.blend_emotions.name: Blend Emotions
entries.capture_baseline.name: Capture Baseline
entries.capture_baseline.description: Save current pose as emotion baseline
entries.look_at.name: Look At Target
entries.look_at.description: Smoothly turn HMD to look at a 3D world point
entries.look_at_direction.name: Look Direction
entries.reset_head.name: Reset Head
entries.start_tracking.name: Start Tracking
entries.stop_tracking.name: Stop Tracking
entries.set_tracking_smooth.name: Set Tracking Smooth
entries.nod_head.name: Nod Head
entries.shake_head.name: Shake Head
entries.tilt_head.name: Tilt Head
entries.wave_hand.name: Wave Hand
entries.bow.name: Bow
entries.start_idle.name: Start Idle Animation
entries.stop_idle.name: Stop Idle Animation
entries.react_to_audio.name: Audio Sync
entries.react_to_audio.description: Drive VR body motion from audio level
entries.vision_face.name: Vision: Face Position
entries.vision_face.description: Receive camera face detection -> VR looks at face
entries.vision_face_lost.name: Vision: Face Lost
entries.vision_face_lost.description: Notify VR that face is lost
entries.vision_expression.name: Vision: Expression
entries.vision_expression.description: Receive expression recognition -> VR emotion sync
entries.vision_gesture.name: Vision: Gesture
entries.vision_gesture.description: Receive gesture recognition -> VR finger sync
entries.vision_object.name: Vision: Object Detection
entries.vision_object.description: Detected object -> VR looks at it
entries.vision_config.name: Vision: Config
entries.get_dashboard_state.name: Get Full State
entries.send_single_packet.name: Send Single Packet
entries.send_single_packet.description: Send a single UDP packet immediately
entries.reset_inputs.name: Reset Inputs
entries.reset_inputs.description: Reset all controller buttons and joysticks
entries.save_settings.name: Save Settings
entries.save_settings.description: Save all VR Controller config to disk
entries.vrc_gesture.name: VRChat Gesture
entries.vrc_gesture_both.name: VRChat Both Hand Gesture
entries.vrc_walk.name: VRChat Walk

entries.vrc_walk_for.description: Walk in VRChat for a set duration then auto-stop
